items.summary: The Royals beat the St. Louis Cardinals, KC 2, STL 0. Stephen Kolek led the night, working 6.1 innings with 0 earned runs, 3 strikeouts and 1 walk. Maikel Garcia supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.6 mph.
items.title: Royals at Cardinals Recap
